title: Shared cross-worktree holds ledger module (additive, unwired)
action: New module skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/worktree-holds.mjs: a path-keyed holds ledger at <mainRoot>/.bee/runtime/cross-worktree-holds.json (grants precedent worktree-store.mjs:35-43 — main store only, atomic tmp+rename writes). Exports: mirrorHold(mainRoot,{path,holder,feature,session,cell,ttl=3600}), releaseHolds(mainRoot,{holder,session=null,cell=null}), findForeignHolds(mainRoot,holder,paths) -> unexpired entries whose holder differs (path overlap semantics reused/mirrored from reservations.mjs pathsOverlap lines 55-71), releaseAllForHolder(mainRoot,id), sweepExpiredHolds(mainRoot). TTL-only expiry (reservations sweepExpired precedent lines 180-195, NO heartbeat), expired entries pruned on every read. Every mutation under withStoreLock(mainRoot,'cross-worktree-holds') (lock.mjs:150 — root is a plain param; sanitized lock names). Holder values: granted worktree id, or literal 'main' for the ordinary checkout. Ledger file missing => empty ledger (fail-open read); corrupt JSON => typed error export holdsStoreCorrupt(mainRoot) mirroring reservationStoreCorrupt (guards.mjs:108-117) for later callers. Unit tests: new '// --- worktree-holds' section in templates/tests/test_lib.mjs (import block at top, check() style). Race suite scripts/test_worktree_holds_race.mjs modeled on scripts/test_reservation_race.mjs; register in scripts/run_verify.mjs SUITES (line 32-67) AND SERIAL_SENSITIVE (line 73-79). Self-onboard to refresh .bee/bin mirrors + render plugin trees. Full verify green.

truths: worktree-holds.mjs exists in templates/lib with the five exports; all mutations locked via withStoreLock(mainRoot,'cross-worktree-holds'); writes are atomic tmp+rename.
findForeignHolds never returns expired entries, never returns the acting holder's own entries, and honors the same path-overlap semantics as reservations (exact/prefix/glob).
Ledger missing reads as empty; corrupt ledger is detectable via an exported corrupt-check mirroring reservationStoreCorrupt.

test_lib.mjs gains a worktree-holds section covering mirror/release/foreign/expiry/prune; test_worktree_holds_race.mjs proves concurrent mirrorHold calls from two processes never lose an entry; both suites registered in run_verify (race suite in SERIAL_SENSITIVE).
Nothing else is wired: no bee.mjs, guards.mjs, cells.mjs, or worktree-store.mjs changes in this cell. Mirrors byte-identical (.bee/bin/lib + plugin trees); full run_verify.mjs green.
prohibitions: Do NOT change reservations.mjs, guards.mjs, cells.mjs, or lock.mjs semantics.
Do NOT store the ledger anywhere except <mainRoot>/.bee/runtime/cross-worktree-holds.json.

trace.outcome: shared cross-worktree holds ledger module (worktree-holds.mjs): mirrorHold/releaseHolds/findForeignHolds/releaseAllForHolder/sweepExpiredHolds/holdsStoreCorrupt, unwired, unit+race tested, full verify green
